name: Florentins
recipeIngredient: 250 grams black chocolate (around one big cup)
50 grams candied fruits (oranges, mandarines, cherry, etc.) (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe comes from the south of France.
I'm not very sure about the translation of gr in cups.
1. Take a large baking dish and butter it.
2. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler. When it's ready, pour the melted chocolate into the dish.
3. Melt the honey in a saucepan.
4. Grill the almonds with the butter. Mix the almonds with the honey, currants, and candied fruits.
5. Spread this mixture onto the chocolate.
6. Let it set for 2 hours.
7. After setting, cut into squares.
For this recipe, you can also use white chocolate and add some alcohol if desired.
